TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jay_Arnette, title = Jay_Arnette, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jay_Arnette} }

S.FORM: Jay Arnette sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1938, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 12, Jay Arnette, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jay Arnette sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1938, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 12, Jay Arnette, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *aj arnette s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *aj arnette, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
